verses.text: The day shall burn as an oven for the proud; but to those who fear His name 'shall the Sun of righteousness arise with healing in his wings.' Christ the Sun. He rises with light and healing for His own.

The day shall burn as an oven for the proud; but to those who fear His name 'shall the Sun of righteousness arise with healing in his wings.' Christ the Sun. He rises with light and healing for His own.
The righteous shall tread down the wicked; 'remember... the law of Moses' given at Horeb. Hold fast the word. While awaiting the Sun, God's people keep His commandments.
The righteous shall tread down the wicked; 'remember... the law of Moses' given at Horeb. Hold fast the word. While awaiting the Sun, God's people keep His commandments.

'I will send you Elijah the prophet before... the great and dreadful day of the LORD,' to turn fathers and children. The Forerunner. The Old Testament closes pointing to John, who would prepare the way for Christ.
